workflows.name: Load Project Data
workflows.description: On page load, fetch the current project data, project stages, and project updates from Supabase. Use the project ID from URL parameters or a global variable to load the specific project. Update the currentProject, projectStages, and projectUpdates variables with the fetched data.

defaultValue.description: Complete kitchen renovation with custom cabinetry and island installation
Master bathroom upgrade with walk-in shower and double vanity
Outdoor composite deck with built-in seating and pergola

defaultValue.title: Foundation Complete
defaultValue.message: Foundation work has been completed successfully. Moving to next phase.

defaultValue.title: Material Delivery
defaultValue.message: Construction materials have been delivered to the site.

defaultValue.title: Weather Delay
defaultValue.message: Construction delayed due to weather conditions. Expected to resume next week.
Initial design concepts have been approved. Moving to detailed planning phase.
Material samples have arrived. Please schedule a time to review them.
Permit application submitted to city planning department.
Contractor availability confirmed for June start date.
